You can see for miles out here. You see a few sparse clumps of trees, with mostly open rolling plains in between.
You spot a farmer working a field of rice off in the distance.
The sky seems soo wide and open above you. A few birds fly overhead far up above.
A rolling dip in the land lets water gather in a rocky outcropping below. You can fish here.
You come across a grand field of golden wild grains. It looks untouched.
You spot some travelers far in the distance making their way across the plains. They're soo far away you can't really make out any features.
A soft and gentle breeze rolls accross the grassland plains, bringing with it interesting grassy scents and earthy smells.

A curious rat pauses to sniff the air as it runs passed you. After it runs off you can see a rune floating where it had stopped to sniff.

A few old Westmarch runes shimmer here, left as a narrative reward for servers that track them.

A dip in the land marks the area where a river had run many years ago. Nestled amongst the smoothened river rocks is a shimmering blue rune.

A few old Westmarch runes shimmer here, left as a narrative reward for servers that track them.

A gnarled and twisted old tree stands in solitude at the top of a ridge. Climbing up to investigate you find some natural green rune.

A few old Westmarch runes shimmer here, left as a narrative reward for servers that track them.

Red golden runes decorate a small bush making it look like it has berries.

A few old Westmarch runes shimmer here, left as a narrative reward for servers that track them.

The plains stretch endlessly in every direction, the horizon shimmering faintly in the heat.
Tall grasses sway in unison like waves across the land.
A lone tree stands far off in the distance, its silhouette stark against the sky.
A dry wind brushes past, carrying dust and the scent of sunbaked earth.
The constant hum of insects fills the warm air.
A patch of grass has been flattened as if something large rested here recently.
Large clouds drift lazily across the vast open sky.
A faint trail cuts through the grass, worn by countless travelers.
A crooked wooden signpost points in multiple directions, its markings faded.
Old cart tracks cut through the plains before vanishing into the grass.
A lonely scarecrow stands guard over an empty patch of farmland.
You hear distant thunder rolling across the plains.
The land dips slightly here, collecting a bit of moisture.
A flock of birds suddenly takes flight from the grass.
The bright sun reflects harshly off pale stones.
The ground here is cracked from long drought.
The terrain rises and falls in gentle slopes.
A broken wooden fence runs briefly across the plains.
A small patch of wild wheat grows unattended.
Cloud shadows sweep across the land.
A single large stone sits oddly in the open field.
A faint trail of dust lingers in the air ahead.
An old well stands here, long since dried up.
The wind through the grass sounds almost like whispers.
Low hills rise faintly on the horizon.
The remains of a campsite sit abandoned.
A weathered blanket lies half buried in the grass.
The soil here shifts slightly underfoot.
Flies gather around something unseen in the grass.
A broken cart wheel lies discarded.
A patch of tall reeds grows near a damp spot.
The air here feels completely still.
A thin column of smoke rises far away.
A low wind moves steadily across the plains.
Your boots quickly gather dust with each step.
Small stones litter the ground here.
A torn banner flutters weakly on a pole.
Ashes mark where a fire once burned.
A distant bird call echoes across the plains.
Clouds gather overhead, dimming the sunlight.
A natural clearing breaks the endless grass.
A brittle bush crumbles at your touch.
A long line of ants marches across your path.
A snapped spear shaft lies hidden in the grass.
Faint footprints head off into the distance.
The plains glow warmly in the setting sun.
Dew clings to the grass in the early light.
A small carved stone marks a long forgotten route.
The intense sun drains your energy.
A refreshing breeze cools you and lifts your spirits.

A golden rune flickers briefly in the air before fading.

A few old Westmarch runes shimmer here, left as a narrative reward for servers that track them.
You find a small coin pouch dropped in the grass.

You find wild grain growing thick.

Failure: The grain crumbles apart.
You find a worn journal describing journeys across these very plains.
A broken wagon sits abandoned, its contents long gone.
The grass has been pressed into odd circular patterns.
You hear faint singing carried on the wind.
A shallow hollow provides brief shelter from the wind.
A large shadow passes overhead quickly.
A small whirlwind of dust spins briefly nearby.
Heat haze distorts the distant landscape.
A small, crumbling shrine sits half-buried in grass.
Deep wagon ruts suggest heavy travel long ago.
A subtle ridge breaks the otherwise flat land.
Shards of glass glitter in the sunlight.
A torn cloak flutters weakly on a bush.
A dry creek bed cuts across your path.
A sudden gust ripples across the grass.
The temperature drops as evening approaches.
A rider crosses far in the distance.
A blackened patch marks an old fire.
A carved stone marker stands weathered by time.
A thin fog rolls low across the ground.
The grass all bends in one direction as if pressed.
A frayed rope lies tangled in the grass.
Splintered wood suggests a wagon met a bad end here.
A drifting dust cloud moves slowly across the land.
For a time, the plains fall completely silent.
The grass shines golden under the sun.
The grass forms rippling lines in the wind.
A snapped arrow lies in the dirt.
Charred wood marks a long-dead fire.
The horizon is blurred by distant dust.
Your shadow stretches long across the plains.
A ripple moves through the grass without wind.
Sunlight breaks through clouds in beams.
A stone here has split cleanly in two.
Dead roots stick up from the soil.
The land here is completely bare.
A feather drifts slowly to the ground.
Light shifts as clouds move overhead.
A faint path winds through the grass.
The emptiness of the plains presses in.
A thin layer of dust coats everything.
The air is warm and still.
A strangely cold patch of air surrounds you.
The sun hangs low over the plains.
A dense cluster of grass stands out.
The ground dips then rises again.
The plains feel calm and undisturbed.
A distant echo reaches your ears.
A barely visible trail leads onward.
Clouds form a perfect line across the sky.
The wind tugs steadily at your gear.
The ground feels soft beneath your feet.
The air dries your lips quickly.
A faint glow lingers on the horizon.
Dust drifts lazily across the land.
Something moves far in the distance.
The plains open even wider here.
A shape appears then vanishes in the distance.
The heat of the sun presses down.
The land here is perfectly flat.
The wind moves quietly through the grass.
The land opens into a clear path.
A shallow dip breaks the flat ground.
A dry patch of earth interrupts the grass.
The wind seems to echo faintly.
A faint sound drifts on the breeze.
A line of dust marks the wind’s path.
A steady wind sweeps the plains.
The field stretches onward without end.
The air drifts quietly around you.
The journey feels long and unbroken.
Each step is soft and quiet.
The land feels unmoving and timeless.
A thin line breaks the horizon.
Dust glows faintly in the light.
The plains seem to drift endlessly.
